{{Quote|If by some miracle they survive to ''land'', I mean to see they ''never'' take off! This venture will be my ticket ''away'' from Daluuj!|Commander Orlok|<ref name="It's a Trap" />}}
The '''Battle of Daluuj''' was a minor skirmish preceding the [[Evacuation of Yavin]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]. It occurred between a small [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] team and [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces under [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Orlok]].

==Background==
Following the first Imperial invasion of [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]], [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]] and his loyal [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] forces fled to meet with the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]]. En route, they were ambushed by Imperial warships over [[Daluuj/Legends|Daluuj]] and forced to evacuate to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] below in [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pods]].

==The skirmish==
The pods were later rescued by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]. Despite being heavily outmanned, Admiral Ackbar came up with a plan to lure the Imperial ground-skimmers over a mud lake with gigantic worms that had previously dragged the ''Millennium Falcon'' down to the bottom upon landing, reasoning that the worms would also be attracted to Imperial machinery as well and attack. Not only were all three ground-skimmers dragged to the bottom, but the ''Falcon'' was raised and the Rebel group was allowed to leave Daluuj.

{{Battle-stub}}
